lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear and has been meticulously maintained. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order, and the car is in like-new condition.

The car is in good condition. The exterior is well-maintained with only minor paint chips. The interior is clean and shows light wear from normal use. All mechanical systems are fully operational and have been regularly serviced.

Step into a reliable and well-cared-for ride! This vehicle is in good condition and has been maintained with care, making it a fantastic choice for your daily commute or weekend adventures. While you might find some light, normal wear from regular use, it remains a strong performer that's ready to hit the road immediately. It's a solid, dependable car that you'll be proud to drive!

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing exactly as it did when it first left the showroom. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep, glass-like finish and absolutely no rock chips, scratches, or imperfections of any kind. Inside, the interior is immaculate; the upholstery shows no wear, and every feature, from the premium sound system to the climate control, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in top-tier shape, having been stored in a climate-controlled garage and maintained with an open checkbook. It drives as smoothly as the day it was built, offering a true 'new car' experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast.

This vehicle is in fair condition and is being sold with a full disclosure of its current state. Mechanically, the car starts and drives reliably, but it has high mileage and shows clear signs of age-related wear. You can expect to perform some routine maintenance soon, such as replacing the brake pads and possibly the tires within the next few months. The exterior has several minor scratches, a few small dings, and some slight paint fading on the hood. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows wear on the driver’s seat upholstery and some of the dashboard buttons. All essential electronics, including the AC and radio, are fully functional. This is a solid choice for someone looking for a dependable commuter who doesn't mind a bit of cosmetic character.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exemplary fusion of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and presented in commendable condition, it offers the discerning driver a refined experience characterized by mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. A premier selection for those who value both heritage and enduring quality, this offering stands as a testament to conscientious ownership.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that still looks sharp on the road? I’m parting with my favorite car, and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s been well-loved and runs like a dream, making it absolutely perfect for your daily commute or fun weekend getaways. I’ve kept it clean and well-maintained, so it’s ready to hit the road as soon as you are. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you’re going to love it!

This E92 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 with an 8,400 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. The powertrain is mated to a precise 6-speed manual transmission and an M Variable Differential Lock for superior lateral dynamics. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and throttle valve actuator service, ensuring peak mechanical performance. The chassis benefits from Electronic Dam
Reliable daily driver. Clean interior. Mechanically sound. Minor exterior wear. Title in hand. Ready for pickup.

This well-cared-for sedan strikes a perfect balance between sophisticated style and reliable performance. The exterior retains a beautiful luster, showing only minor cosmetic imperfections that reflect its history on the open road. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium leather seats are in great shape, and the dual-zone climate control and infotainment system work flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is sound, having undergone regular professional servicing to ensure the powertrain remains responsive and efficient. It’s a turn-key vehicle, ready for daily commutes or weekend getaways, offering a premium driving experience at a fair value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it exhibits commendable mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. An ideal selection for the discerning driver who prioritizes reliability and professional-grade upkeep.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. While it displays the character of a well-tended automobile, its operational excellence remains uncompromised. An ideal selection for the discerning driver seeking a premium balance of luxury and long-term utility.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and she's been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it the perfect reliable companion for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. Everything runs smoothly, and it's ready for a new owner to jump in and go! Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it feels on the road!

This 2002 Porsche 911 Carrera (996.2) features the robust 3.6L flat-six engine equipped with VarioCam Plus, delivering a linear power band and exceptional throttle response. The 6-speed manual transaxle offers crisp engagement, complemented by a factory-optioned limited-slip differential for superior corner-exit traction. The chassis remains taut, benefitting from recent bushing refres
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents in impressive overall health. The exterior paint retains a lustrous, deep finish, with only minor, expected stone chips on the forward-facing surfaces consistent with careful road use. All body panels are straight with factory-consistent gaps. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery shows very little wear, with only light softening of the driver’s side bolster, while every electronic feature—from the responsive infotainment screen to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is robust, offering a smooth, quiet ride with precise steering and firm, confident braking. It comes with a documented service history, and the tires provide excellent grip with substantial tread remaining. This is a solid, honest example that perfectly balances performance and comfort, ready for its next owner to drive away with complete peace of mind.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience backed by a consistent service history. A premier selection for the discerning buyer who prioritizes mechanical integrity and sustained quality.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of luxury and mechanical integrity. Demonstrating a consistent history of care and performance, this model delivers a refined driving experience and aesthetic appeal that exceeds standard expectations for its class. We invite you to inspect this exceptional example of engineering excellence, priced competitively for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved. Whether you’re commuting or heading out on a road trip, this beauty is ready to go! It runs smoothly and looks great—I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I have.

Offered is a mechanically robust 997-generation Carrera featuring the venerable 3.6L horizontally-opposed flat-six. This driver-focused example utilizes a G97 six-speed manual transaxle, delivering power to the rear wheels with surgical precision. The chassis maintains its composure through Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM), while the steering remains communicative and free of dead-center play. Recent preventative maintenance includes a documented IMS bearing retrofit and a comprehensive cooling system refresh with a low-temperature thermostat. The braking system features cross-drilled rotors with ample swept area and firm pedal feel. While the exterior displays honest patina consistent with its enthusiast-driven history, the powertrain remains in peak operational form, exhibiting no bore scoring or significant oil consumption. This is a visceral, analog machine optimized for technical apex-clipping and sustained high-RPM performance.
Good condition. Runs smooth. Clean interior. Recent service completed. Title in hand.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition, offering a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, with well-preserved upholstery and all electronic features—including the premium sound system and climate control—functioning exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is robust; the engine runs smoothly, and the transmission provides crisp, reliable shifts. It has benefited from a rigorous service history, including a recent comprehensive multi-point inspection and fluid service, ensuring it is ready for the road immediately. This is a reliable, high-quality choice for a discerning buyer looking for a well-cared-for daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier acquisition opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating a consistent history of professional service and conscientious ownership, the automobile remains in commendable mechanical and aesthetic condition. It offers a refined driving experience, balancing robust performance with a sophisticated presence. This offering provides exceptional value for those prioritizing reliability and prestige in their next automotive investment.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Ideally suited for the discerning driver who prioritizes consistent operation and proven durability, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition within its class.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained, so it’s ready to hit the road with its next owner right away. Whether you're commuting or planning a weekend getaway, this beauty handles perfectly and looks great doing it. I'm looking for a fair price for a car that still has so many adventures left in it. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it feels!
This E92 M3 is a driver’s specimen featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering linear power up to an 8,400 RPM redline. The chassis is equipped with Electronic Damper
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

Step into a vehicle that perfectly balances performance and reliability. This well-maintained example features a clean, glossy exterior and an interior that feels remarkably fresh, with supple seating and a smoke-free cabin. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the car has been serviced religiously, showing no leaks and offering a smooth, responsive ride. With matching tires in excellent shape and a recent professional detail, this car presents beautifully and is mechanically ready for any long-distance journey or daily commute.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and value, maintained to a high standard of mechanical and cosmetic excellence. It boasts a complete service record, confirming its consistent care and operational reliability. The exterior retains a professional luster, while the cabin provides a comfortable, well-preserved environment. An ideal acquisition for the pragmatic buyer who demands uncompromising roadworthiness and a polished presentation.
